    Our Expertise

    SIM Based Authentication

    Next-Gen Security. Simple. Effective.

    A one-stop shop that authenticate your customers across all platforms

    Tailored Solutions

    Efficient Processes

    Cutting-edge Technology

    Unibeam works by linking the unique ID on a user’s  SIM/eSIM card with their phone’s unique ID. There are different levels of security you can use.

    Discover Our Authentication Levels

    How Unibeam user authentication works

    Seamless Integration

    With VerifyHub, the setup is a one-time process, eliminating the need for complex coding or ongoing maintenance. Our solution is designed for easy integration, allowing you to focus on your core business activities.

    Schedule a Demo

    Next-Gen Security. Simple. Effective.

    Unlike traditional MFA methods like SMS OTP, yubikey or passkeys, Unibeam eliminates the risks of SIM swaps, phishing attacks, eavesdropping, social engineering, large-scale  database hacks, and password leaks.

    Robust Security Measures

    Multi Platform support

    ZERO Installation on device or on your servers 

    Schedule a Demo

    our secret sauce

    Unibeam works by linking the unique ID on a user’s  SIM/eSIM card with their phone’s unique ID.  We use unique identifiers for each device and company, Plus, we don’t store any Personally Identifiable Information (PII), minimizing data leak risks and ensuring compliance with privacy laws.

    Multi-platform Security
